key_risks: Hawkish FOMC outcome on June 17 (after cutoff) could trigger growth/semis drawdown given 4.47% 10y yields
Semiconductor and South Korea positions are highly correlated, amplifying any tech-sentiment reversal
Hot June CPI on July 14 could pressure rate-sensitive growth before exit close
Crowded momentum trade vulnerable to sharp factor rotation

portfolio.rationale: Strongest momentum across timeframes with AI capex tailwinds; semis leading the tech rally with broad supply-chain demand.
Persistent factor leadership (9.4% 30d) captures trending winners while diversifying single-sector risk.
Semiconductor-driven export momentum extremely strong; benefits from same AI/chip cycle with country diversification.
Solid cyclical breadth (ITA/defense strong), steady output, benefits from broad market participation outside mega-cap.
Hedge against sticky CPI (4.2% YoY) and FOMC surprise risk; safe-haven ballast with positive 1y trend.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward strong, persistent momentum in semiconductors and AI-linked exports while holding industrial cyclical breadth and a gold hedge against the post-cutoff FOMC and hot inflation prints.
rationale_summary: Momentum-led growth concentration in semis/AI with diversification into industrials and a gold inflation/event hedge.
